title: Skeleton + contracts + foundation
summary: Bootstrap MarketRegimeBot with ROADMAP.md, regime_registry.json v1.1.0, registry validator, and tests.

title: Autocycle architecture preparation
summary: Autocycle architecture design completed. Autocycle execution not implemented. Human approval remains mandatory.

title: Regime definitions documentation and naming alignment
summary: Create docs/regime_definitions.md with full regime vocabulary. Align registry IDs with classifier/contracts (BULL_MARKET vs BULL mismatch). Add scoring_hints and signal fields to regime_registry.json. No code changes to classifier or contracts.

title: Read market index data read-only
summary: Implement read-only market data adapter in core/market_data_reader.py using static fixture files or public read-only sources. Requires human review before commit. Depends on REGIME-PHASE-002A naming alignment.

title: Volatility regime detection
summary: Implement volatility regime detector using VIX or realized volatility metrics. Classify as HIGH_VOL, NORMAL, LOW_VOL. Pure analytics â€” no broker, no execution.

title: Risk-on / risk-off classifier
summary: Implement risk-on/risk-off composite classifier using market breadth, credit spreads, and volatility signals. Advisory output only â€” no execution.

title: AllocationBot snapshot integration
summary: Export regime classification to result_snapshot.json for AllocationBot and NovaBridge consumption. Surface regime, confidence, risk_level, timestamp. No execution.

title: Human approval / dashboard output
summary: Create read-only regime dashboard and human-readable report. Include current regime, confidence score, volatility environment, and regime history. Human review required for any downstream action.

title: Regime confidence scoring
summary: Produce a 0â€“100 confidence score alongside each regime classification. Score reflects signal agreement, data quality, and historical accuracy. Advisory output only.

title: Historical regime classification log
summary: Store each regime classification with timestamp and confidence in data/system/regime_history.json. Enables transition detection and trend analysis. Read-only writes to local data dir.

title: Regime transition detection
summary: Detect when regime changes from one state to another. Record transition timestamp, from_regime, to_regime, and confidence delta. Advisory report entry only â€” no execution triggered.

title: Regime-strategy compatibility matrix
summary: Produce a static matrix mapping each regime to recommended and discouraged options strategies. Used by TacticBot and NovaBotV2Options as advisory context. Documentation and JSON output only.

title: TacticBot-compatible regime export format
summary: Define and document the JSON schema for regime export files that NovaTacticBot can ingest. Align with TacticalEvent contract. No implementation â€” schema specification and documentation only.
